testcase.name: returns 404 when prebuilt zip and extension folder are both missing
serves prebuilt zip from public when available
archives from the correct extension directory path when prebuilt zip is missing
checks paths in expected order for prebuilt zip then extension dir
returns 401 when no session is present
returns 400 when file is missing from the request
returns 200 with recording data on successful upload
returns 500 when Supabase upload fails
auto-creates bucket when it does not exist yet
returns 401 when no session is present
returns recordings list with pagination total
cleans orphaned DB entries that lack valid Supabase URLs
returns empty recordings array when user has no recordings
returns 401 when no session is present
returns 400 when id is missing
returns 404 when recording does not exist or belongs to another user
uses Manifest V3
is named "Meet Recorder"
has a semantic version
declares required permissions
grants host_permissions for meet.google.com and localhost:3000
registers background service worker as background.js
registers popup as popup/popup.html
injects content.js into Google Meet tabs
injects dashboard-bridge.js into localhost:3000 tabs
declares dashboard-page-session.js as web_accessible_resource for localhost:3000
file exists and is non-empty
checks next-auth.session-token cookie at localhost:3000
also checks __Secure- cookie variant for HTTPS sessions
returns requiresAuth: true when user is not logged in
handles start-recording message and calls tabCapture
handles stop-recording, pause-recording, and resume-recording messages
saves and restores recording state via chrome.storage
emits recording-complete message after upload finishes
responds to ping messages
file exists and is non-empty
uploads recording to the dashboard recordings API
uses POST method for upload
sends credentials: include for session cookie forwarding
records in audio/webm format
triggers recording-complete message after upload
also downloads recording locally (local backup)
handles mic inclusion path
file exists and is non-empty
listens for meet-recorder-dashboard-session messages
injects dashboard-page-session.js as external script (CSP-safe)
forwards userId and email to background script via chrome.runtime.sendMessage
refreshes session probe periodically via setInterval
file exists and is non-empty
fetches session from /api/auth/session
posts userId and email to window using postMessage
uses window.location.origin as postMessage target (not wildcard)
returns 401 when no session is present
returns 200 with recording data when found
returns 404 when recording is not found
returns 404 when recording belongs to a different user
passes correct userId to Prisma query
returns 401 when no session is present
returns 404 when recording is not found
deletes DB record and returns success
still deletes DB record even when Supabase bucket delete fails
does not attempt Supabase delete for non-Supabase URLs
responds with ok: true and expected env keys
reports GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID as present and looksLikeAppsId when set
masks GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID value and does not expose it in plain text
masks NEXTAUTH_SECRET value
reports looksPlaceholder true for NEXTAUTH_SECRET containing placeholder text
reports DATABASE_URL as not present when env var is unset
reports NEXTAUTH_URL value directly (not masked)
reports looksPlaceholder true for DATABASE_URL with placeholder tokens
